project.name: CraftFolio
project.description: A web app that lets users pick color themes, reorder sections, fill in their data, and receive a single downloadable portfolio HTML file — no auth, no persistence, no deployment needed.

src/pages/.Landing.jsx: Level 0 — hero page with Craft Now CTA button, redirects to /customize
src/pages/.Customizer.jsx: Level 1 — theme picker + drag-drop section reorder + layout selector per section
src/pages/.UserForm.jsx: Level 2 — multi-step form collecting all user data fields
src/pages/.Loading.jsx: Level 3 — build animation, fires POST /generate, enforces 5000ms minimum display
src/pages/.Output.jsx: Level 4 — iframe (srcDoc) preview + download HTML button + copy code button

src/components/.ThemePicker.jsx: Renders 10 swatches split into Light (5) and Dark (5) tabs
src/components/.SectionReorder.jsx: dnd-kit DragDropContext list; each item has visibility toggle (exclude) + layout selector (1/2/3)
src/components/.LayoutSelector.jsx: Renders 3 mini thumbnail previews per section, highlights active selection
src/components/.IframePreview.jsx: Wraps iframe with srcDoc prop and sandbox='allow-scripts allow-same-origin'

src/context/.CraftContext.jsx: Global state provider — exposes: customization, setCustomization, userData, setUserData, generatedHtml, setGeneratedHtml

src/api/.craftApi.js: Single function: generatePortfolio(customization, userData) → axios POST /generate → returns data.html string

frontend/.src/main.jsx: Vite entry, wraps App in CraftProvider

backend/.main.py: FastAPI app init, CORS middleware (allow_origins localhost:5173), includes router
backend/.models.py: Pydantic v2 models: GenerateRequest, GenerateResponse, Customization, UserData, Project, Certification
backend/.generator/assembler.py: Main orchestrator function: build_portfolio(customization, user_data) → full HTML string

library/.sections/hero/: layout_1.html (split text+image), layout_2.html (centered large type), layout_3.html (asymmetric blob)
library/.sections/about/: layout_1.html (text+image row), layout_2.html (card with timeline), layout_3.html (minimal centered)
library/.sections/skills/: layout_1.html (chip grid), layout_2.html (progress bars), layout_3.html (icon grid)
library/.sections/certifications/: layout_1.html (badge cards), layout_2.html (timeline list), layout_3.html (compact table-style)
library/.sections/contact/: layout_1.html (centered email + links), layout_2.html (split with quicklinks), layout_3.html (minimal icon row)
library/.base/base.css: CSS resets, typography, shared utility classes: .container .btn-primary .btn-outline .chip .skill-chip .card .section
library/.base/animations.js: IntersectionObserver scroll-in animations — adds 'visible' class to elements with data-animate attribute
library/.themes/themes.json: 10 theme objects keyed by theme name, each containing CSS custom property map

customization.theme: string — must match a key in themes.json
customization.sections_order: string[] — ordered list of active section names
customization.section_layouts: Record<string, 1|2|3> — layout number per section (default: 1 for all)

userData.name: string REQUIRED
userData.title: string REQUIRED
userData.projects: Project[] — each: { name, description, link?, tech_stack[] }
userData.certifications: Certification[] — each: { name, issuer, year, link? }
userData.profile_image: string | null — base64 data URL or remote URL

response_schema.html: string — complete single-file HTML portfolio (DOCTYPE + all styles + all sections + JS)

api_contract.error_handling: FastAPI returns 422 on Pydantic validation failure; frontend should catch and show retry UI

section_template_contract.description: Rules every .html file in library/sections/*/ MUST follow for the assembler to process it correctly
rules: Every <section> element must have id equal to the section folder name (e.g. id='hero', id='projects')
NO hardcoded color values anywhere — only var(--color-*) custom properties
Scalar placeholders use double curly brace syntax: {{NAME}} {{TITLE}} {{BIO}} {{GITHUB}} {{LINKEDIN}} {{EMAIL}} {{PROFILE_IMAGE}}
Each template includes its own scoped <style> block at the bottom — assembler concatenates all styles
No external JS imports inside templates — animations handled globally by animations.js via data-animate attribute
Navbar template additionally uses {{NAV_LINKS}} placeholder which the assembler fills with generated anchor tags
All interactive animations must be CSS-only or via the shared animations.js IntersectionObserver — no form submissions

placeholder_registry.{{PROJECTS_LOOP}}: Rendered HTML block of project cards — see _render_projects()
placeholder_registry.{{SKILLS_LOOP}}: Rendered HTML block of skill chips — see _render_skills()
placeholder_registry.{{CERTS_LOOP}}: Rendered HTML block of cert cards — see _render_certs()
placeholder_registry.{{NAV_LINKS}}: Assembled anchor tags for in-page nav + GitHub/LinkedIn quicklinks (navbar only)

theme_contract.how_theme_is_applied: assembler.py calls _theme_to_css_vars() which converts the theme dict to a CSS :root { } block injected into wrapper.html via {{THEME_CSS}} slot

slots.{{PORTFOLIO_TITLE}}: Inserted into <title> tag and optionally <meta og:title>
slots.{{THEME_CSS}}: CSS :root { --var: value; } block from selected theme
slots.{{SECTIONS_BODY}}: Concatenated HTML of all processed section templates in user-defined order
slots.{{ANIMATIONS_JS}}: Full contents of base/animations.js wrapped in <script> tag

steps.name: Load Theme
steps.action: Call load_theme(customization['theme']) → returns dict of CSS var → value

steps.name: Load Shared Assets
steps.action: Read base/base.css and base/animations.js as raw text strings

steps.name: Build Navbar
steps.then: Call _build_nav_links(active_sections, github, linkedin) to generate anchor tags
steps.then2: Replace {{NAV_LINKS}} in navbar template, then call inject_user_data()
steps.note: Navbar is ALWAYS included regardless of sections_order or excluded_sections

steps.name: Process Sections Loop
for_each: Skip if section is in excluded_sections
Get layout number from section_layouts dict (default 1)
Call load_section_template(section_name, layout_num) to read from filesystem
Call inject_user_data(raw_template, user_data, section_name) to fill all placeholders
Append filled HTML string to sections_html_parts list

steps.name: Assemble Final HTML
steps.action: Read wrapper.html, replace all 5 slots with computed values

routes.action: User picks theme, reorders/excludes sections, picks layouts → navigate('/form')
User fills in all personal data → navigate('/loading')
Fires generatePortfolio(), enforces 5000ms minimum, then navigate('/output')
Renders iframe with srcDoc=generatedHtml, download + copy buttons

loading_screen_logic.algorithm: Record startTime = Date.now() before API call. On resolve: elapsed = Date.now() - startTime; remaining = max(0, 5000 - elapsed); setTimeout(navigate('/output'), remaining)
loading_screen_logic.on_error: Show error state with retry button; do NOT auto-navigate

output_page_logic.iframe_method: srcDoc attribute — injects HTML string directly, no URL or blob URL needed
output_page_logic.download: Create Blob({type:'text/html'}), URL.createObjectURL(), anchor click, revokeObjectURL

sections_config.navbar_special_behavior: Assembled before the loop; receives {{NAV_LINKS}} with anchor hrefs matching section IDs + GitHub/LinkedIn quicklinks

path_resolution.note: Set once in assembler.py; all reads cascade from it. Assumes backend/ is one level inside craftfolio/ root, same level as library/

extensibility_hooks.add_new_section: Create library/sections/{new_section_name}/layout_1.html, layout_2.html, layout_3.html following template contract — zero backend code changes needed
extensibility_hooks.add_new_theme: Append new key to library/themes/themes.json with all 10 required CSS vars — zero backend code changes needed
extensibility_hooks.add_new_layout: Add layout_4.html to an existing section folder — update frontend LayoutSelector to offer 4 options for that section

constraints.portfolio_animations: CSS + IntersectionObserver only — no heavy animation libraries
constraints.portfolio_interactivity: Scroll animations, hover effects, smooth nav anchors — no backend calls from portfolio

recommended_sequence.task: Build library/themes/themes.json with all 10 theme objects
Build all 21 section template files (7 sections × 3 layouts) following template contract
recommended_sequence.note: Start with navbar (special) then hero, about, skills, projects, certifications, contact

recommended_sequence.task: Build backend/generator/template_engine.py (load_theme, load_section_template, inject_user_data, render helpers)
Build backend/main.py (FastAPI app, CORS, POST /generate route)
Build all 5 page components (Landing, Customizer, UserForm, Loading, Output)
Wire up React Router in App.jsx, wrap in CraftProvider in main.jsx
Integration test: run backend (uvicorn main:app), run frontend (vite), submit form, verify iframe output, verify download
